caption: A man with blond hair wearing a dark shirt and headphones is visible in a small inset window in the lower-left corner of the screen. He gestures with his hands and speaks while sitting in front of a background featuring a decorated holiday tree. The main screen begins with a purple and black gradient and the text "BACK" next to a red icon. A large, stylized 3D logo featuring a lime green and white "U1" on a dark grey rectangular base then appears against a background of green and blue horizontal digital lines. This logo remains centered and stationary as the man continues to talk. In the final sequence, the logo is obscured by a bright, explosive flash of yellow and green light that fills the center of the screen, creating a burst effect that radiates outward.
